case_title: NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC. vs. SOL-PLEX MFG, INC.; AKA SOL-PLEX MANUFACTURING,INC et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $120.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SOL-PLEX MFG, INC.; AKA SOL-PLEX MANUFACTURING,INC
